## Docs checklist

- [ ] API routes changed → mirrored doc in `docs/apis/<path>/route.md` updated (+ row in `docs/apis/index.md`)
- [ ] Notable decision made → appended to the Decision Log in `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`
- [ ] Seed/fixture state changed → `docs/seed/README.md` updated
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
